payload.name: Parents' Aadhaar Cards
payload.purpose: Identity and address verification for birth registration
payload.alternatives: Passport, Voter ID, or Ration Card with photo

payload.name: Hospital Discharge Summary
payload.purpose: Proof of institutional birth for hospital registration pathway
payload.alternatives: Hospital birth certificate or medical records from delivery

payload.name: Two Witness Declarations
payload.purpose: Attestation of birth circumstances for home births
payload.alternatives: Neighbors, relatives, or community members who knew about the birth. They do not need to be government officials.

payload.name: Medical Attendant Certificate
payload.purpose: Confirmation by doctor, nurse, or midwife who attended the birth
payload.alternatives: If unavailable, additional witness declarations or pregnancy records

payload.name: Address Proof from Birth Time Period
payload.purpose: Establishing jurisdictional location for zonal office assignment
payload.alternatives: Rental agreement, utility bill, or employer letter from that period
payload.when_required: Home births and some delayed registrations

payload.name: Late Registration Affidavit
payload.purpose: Legal declaration explaining delay in registration with penalty calculation
payload.alternatives: Prescribed format available at BBMP offices or through agent assistance

payload.name: Notarized Affidavit for Correction
payload.purpose: Legal declaration requesting minor correction on birth certificate
payload.alternatives: Drafted on non-judicial stamp paper and signed before notary

payload.name: Gazette Notification
payload.purpose: Official government publication for major name or identity changes
payload.alternatives: Required for all major corrections; cannot be substituted
payload.when_required: Major corrections and name inclusion beyond 1 year

payload.name: Newspaper Publications
payload.purpose: Public notice of name change in both Kannada and English newspapers
payload.alternatives: Two newspaper clippings required as proof
